---
title: "Projects"
---

## Software

Taiwan's government open data is a rich resource, but it is rarely tidy: formats, encodings, and release conventions differ from agency to agency, so downloading and cleaning it by hand is tedious and easy to get wrong. The R packages below exist to take that friction away — each automates the retrieval and cleaning of a particular public dataset so it can be read into an analysis environment quickly and reproducibly.

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/weather.svg){fig-alt="twweather package hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**twweather**
:::

::: paper-meta
R package, 2026.
:::

::: paper-desc
Downloads Taiwan's historical weather observations from the Central Weather Administration (CWA / CODiS) station network: tidy station metadata, station-level time series (hourly, daily, monthly), and township- or any-polygon estimates via inverse-distance-weighted spatial interpolation.
:::

::: paper-links
[GitHub](https://github.com/yyliou/weather){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/hotel.svg){fig-alt="twhotel package hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**twhotel**
:::

::: paper-meta
R package, 2026.
:::

::: paper-desc
Builds a hotel-by-month panel from the Taiwan Tourism Administration's monthly *Tourist Hotel Operating Statistics*. It crawls, downloads, and parses the official workbooks into one tidy table covering occupancy, revenue, staffing, and guests by nationality — ready for empirical panel analysis.
:::

::: paper-links
[GitHub](https://github.com/yyliou/hotel){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/plvr.svg){fig-alt="plvr package hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**plvr**
:::

::: paper-meta
R package, 2026.
:::

::: paper-desc
Retrieves Taiwan's actual real-estate transaction records (實價登錄) from the Ministry of the Interior open data. Given a date range, it downloads the spanning quarterly releases, keeps only the requested transaction categories (sales, pre-sale units, rentals) and regions, and stores them as compact Parquet files for efficient querying with `arrow`, `dplyr`, or DuckDB.
:::

::: paper-links
[GitHub](https://github.com/yyliou/re){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/twcovid.svg){fig-alt="twcovid package hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**twcovid**
:::

::: paper-meta
R package, 2026.
:::

::: paper-desc
Retrieves Taiwan CDC's COVID-19 open data — confirmed cases and deaths — and reshapes it into analysis-ready panels. A single `tw_covid()` call sets the outcome, time unit (day, ISO week, or month), date basis (onset or case-judgment date), and panel cross-section (any subset of county, township, sex, imported status, age group), returning per-period flows or cumulative totals, optionally zero-filled into a balanced panel. Daily source files are aggregated internally, so the time axis is fully controlled and reproducible.
:::

::: paper-links
[GitHub](https://github.com/yyliou/covid){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/scen.svg){fig-alt="scen package hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**scen**
:::

::: paper-meta
R package, 2026.
:::

::: paper-desc
An R client for the Taiwan Tourism Administration's Tourism Statistics Database (觀光統計資料庫). With no public API on the source site, `scen` reproduces its request-signing scheme to return tidy `tibble`s of visitor counts for scenic and recreational spots (觀光遊憩據點), plus inbound, outbound, and cruise figures down to the finest cross-tabulations (e.g. age × gender × purpose) — with automatic ROC-year conversion, throttling, and caching.
:::

::: paper-links
[GitHub](https://github.com/yyliou/scen){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

## Research Projects

**Research Assistant — Department of Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University**

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Enhancement of the Greenhouse Gas Voluntary Reduction System and Capacity Building for Natural Carbon Sinks**
:::

::: paper-meta
May–Dec 2026
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Adaptation of Food and Agricultural System to Net Zero Policies (III)**
:::

::: paper-meta
Mar 2026 · NSTC114-2119-M002-014
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=17692765){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**The Impact of Aquavoltaics Policy on Farmland Price — the Case of Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Feb, Apr 2026 · NSTC114-2410-H002-244
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=17864383){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Policy Cost-Benefit Analysis and Strategic Recommendations for Enhancing Carbon Sink Capacity in Taiwan: A Case Study on Soil-Optimized Agricultural Production Models**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jul–Dec 2025 · 114農科-13.1.1-永-04
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=18205896){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Applied Analysis of the Farmland Price Index in Response to the National Land Planning Policy**
:::

::: paper-meta
May–Jun 2025 · 113農基金-永續-11
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Adaptation of Food and Agricultural System to Net Zero Policies (II)**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Mar 2025 · NSTC113-2119-M002-027
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=16356859){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Farm Labor Supply in Online Job-Matching Platforms — the Case of Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
Aug–Dec 2024, Apr–Jun 2025 · NSTC113-2410-H002-244
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=16550712){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Establishing a Framework for Ecosystem Services in Organic Agriculture: Value Investigation and Quantification Model for Vegetables and Rice**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jul–Dec 2024 · 113農再-2.2.2-1.5-糧-004
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Cost Assessments and Policy Suggestions for Carbon-sink-increasing Strategies in Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
May–Jun 2024, Oct–Dec 2024 · 113前瞻-18.4.1-永-04
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=16802633){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Research on Electric Vehicle Industry Policies and Competition Law Regulations**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Aug 2024 · FTC-113-G02
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=16002886){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Economic Evaluation of Circular Economy Using Agricultural By-Products**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Apr 2024 · MOST110-2621-M002-018-MY3
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=15427747){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Adaptation of Food and Agricultural System to Net Zero Policies (I)**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Apr 2024 · NSTC112-2119-M002-025
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=15159348){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Cost Assessments and Policy Suggestions for Carbon-sink-increasing Strategies in Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
Oct–Dec 2023 · 112前瞻-18.4.1-氣-n4
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=15522634){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Evaluation and Establishment of Farmland Price Indices for Decision-making on Sustainable Farmland Use**
:::

::: paper-meta
Oct–Dec 2023 · 112農基金-1.1-企-10-(2)
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**University Social Responsibility Program: "Partnership with Yunlin — Deepening Industrial Linkages in Key Agricultural Areas"**
:::

::: paper-meta
Aug–Dec 2023 · 112L5A001B
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Economic Analysis of Farm Succession — a Case Study of Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Jul 2023 · MOST111-2410-H002-230
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=14515711){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Decision Evaluation of Farmland Resources and Sustainable Uses**
:::

::: paper-meta
Aug–Dec 2022 · 111農科-3.1.3-企-Q2(Z)
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=14766648){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Food Accessibility, Market Competition and Housing Prices — Empirical Evidence of Convenience Stores in Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
Feb–Jul 2022 · MOST110-2410-H002-219
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=13876061){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Economic Analysis of Farmer Occupational Injury Insurance Program in Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Jul 2021 · MOST109-2410-H002-128
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=13536427){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Impact of Rural Regeneration Programs on Farm Labor and Leisure Agriculture Participation**
:::

::: paper-meta
Mar–Jul 2020, Aug–Dec 2020 · 109農再-2.1.3-1.3-企-015
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Impact of Sharing Economy on Farmland Price in Taiwan**
:::

::: paper-meta
Jan–Aug 2020 · MOST108-2410-H002-053
:::

::: paper-links
[GRB](https://www.grb.gov.tw/search/planDetail?id=13130874){.paper-btn}
:::
:::::
␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀
